assertions.title: Sorting changes the visible candidate ordering inside the review flow

steps.action: Open the app and submit the fixture creator-profile link
steps.expected: Candidate review opens for the current session
steps.observed: Candidate review opened at /sessions/session_f0e2ce69736f9fe9fdd144aa with 8 discovered videos.
Top rows were 旅行Vlog, 新品开箱, 美食探店 with Score descending active.

steps.expected: Rows reorder by title while staying on candidate review
steps.observed: Row order changed to 随手拍, 读书分享, 美食探店, 日常碎片, 旅行Vlog, 新品开箱, 如何制作完美的咖啡拉花, 今日穿搭分享 and remained on candidate review.

evidence.network: POST /api/intake -> 200; repeated GET /api/sessions/session_f0e2ce69736f9fe9fdd144aa -> 200 while staying on /sessions/session_f0e2ce69736f9fe9fdd144aa

assertions.title: Recommendation-focused filtering narrows the visible candidate set

steps.action: Open candidate review with the fixture creator-profile session
steps.expected: All discovered rows are visible before filtering
steps.observed: 8 candidate rows were visible before filtering, including 2 non-recommended rows.

steps.expected: Only recommended rows remain with selection controls intact
steps.observed: The table narrowed from 8 rows to 6 recommended rows and still showed per-row selection controls; no preparation started.

evidence.network: No prepare request observed while toggling Recommended only; session remained on candidate review.

assertions.title: Individual and bulk selection stay visible on the review surface

steps.action: Open candidate review and click two individual row checkboxes
steps.expected: Selected rows remain visible and the manual selection count is shown
steps.observed: Selecting 旅行Vlog and 新品开箱 exposed Prepare Selected (2) while keeping both selected rows visible in the table.

steps.expected: All visible rows become selected without triggering preparation
steps.observed: The CTA updated to Prepare Selected (8) and all visible candidate checkboxes remained on the review surface; no preparation navigation occurred.

evidence.network: Only intake/session fetches were observed; no POST /prepare request occurred during individual or bulk selection.

steps.expected: Manual selection state is visible before table interactions
steps.observed: Prepare Selected (2) appeared after selecting 旅行Vlog and 新品开箱.

steps.expected: Selected rows stay selected after reorder
steps.observed: After title sort, the selected rows moved positions but Prepare Selected (2) remained visible and both selected rows were still shown as selected.

steps.expected: Selections for remaining rows are retained
steps.observed: After filtering to recommended rows, Prepare Selected (2) persisted and both selected recommended rows remained selected in the filtered table.

evidence.network: No prepare request observed while sorting/filtering selected rows; selection state stayed in-session on the candidate review page.

frictions.description: The mission-specific .factory/library/user-testing.md file referenced by the validator prompt was not present on disk.
frictions.resolution: Proceeded using AGENTS.md guidance and the validation contract only.

frictions.description: After intake submission, agent-browser briefly reported URL / while the rendered candidate review was already visible, likely due to Next.js client navigation timing.
frictions.resolution: Added a short wait and verified the final session URL plus screenshots before evaluating assertions.

summary: Tested 4 assertions: 4 passed, 0 failed, 0 blocked. Sorting, recommended-only filtering, individual/bulk selection, and selection persistence across sort/filter all behaved as specified in the candidate review flow.
